responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Build and deploy enterprise time zone architecture, fix owner sign-in, align colors with IVX landing palette, QA/redesign Reels card, fix chat UX issues, and redesign IVX registration/login experience as premium glass card

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; never store local device times in database
- Convert UTC → local timezone only when displaying data
- Auto-detect on login and registration: IANA timezone, UTC offset, country, region, language, 12h/24h preference
- Display modes: UTC, Owner Time, User Time, Property Time, Custom Time Zone
- Reports must allow switching between UTC, Local Time, Server Time
- Audit logs must show: UTC, Local Time, Time Zone, Offset, Device
- All platforms (Expo, Android, iOS, Web) must use the same time service
- Automatically support Daylight Saving Time — no manual adjustment
- Verify 8 cities: New York, Miami, California, London, Madrid, Dubai, Tokyo, Sydney
- Verify timestamps before and after DST transitions
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically — manual email + password required on every launch
- Owner sign-in must require password match — NO passwordless endpoint bypass
- "Remember Me" must be OFF by default
- App colors must match landing page — black/gold IVX theme with `#FFD700` gold (NOT `#E6C200`), `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- `chat.ivxholding.com` is a separate Render static site (`srv-d7t9j00sfn5c738a18j0`) that must be independently deployed
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create a new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork runtime dependencies
- Registration redesign: centered premium glass card, IVX logo + "Invest. Build. Grow." branding, animated Sign Up/Login tabs, 7 role options (Investor, Buyer, Realtor, Broker, Influencer, JV Partner, Tokenized Investor), email verification + phone OTP after signup, inline validation, password strength indicator, Remember Me + Forgot Password, secure badges (256-bit encryption, Privacy Protected), fully responsive for Android/iPhone/tablet/desktop, accessibility (large touch targets, keyboard-safe), preserve all existing Supabase/RBAC/owner access logic

## Progress
### Done
- **Owner auto-login removal FULLY IMPLEMENTED, DEPLOYED, AND VERIFIED**:
  - Commits `c67f8a2`, `e831c8d`, `e936eef`; deploy `dep-d99r34v7f7vs73b7mfs0` live
  - All 3 auto-login paths blocked in `auth-context.tsx`; `manualOwnerLoginRef` guards `onAuthStateChange`
- **Owner sign-in fix FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED — USER CONFIRMED WORKING**:
  - Commit `d6dbfce` → GitHub `43be880c6310` — Render deploy `dep-d99v2css728c73e1e120` LIVE
  - Removed passwordless routing block from `handleLogin()` in `expo/app/login.tsx`
  - User confirmed: "Owner sign in is working"
- **App color alignment FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**:
  - Commit `771babe` → GitHub `b5c577b53ca5` — replaced 784 hardcoded old colors across 104 Expo files
- **`chat.ivxholding.com` color fix FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED**:
  - IVX colors in bundle: `#FFD700` 507×, `#00C48C` 640×, `#4A90D9` 311×, `#FF4D4D` 242×
- **Enterprise data protection architecture BUILT, DEPLOYED, AND VERIFIED**:
  - 7 new backend services + 1 new API + 2 new Expo files + runbook docs
  - All 8 new recovery endpoints verified: return 401 unauthenticated, 200 with owner JWT
  - Recovery objectives: RPO 5min, RTO 60min, 35d daily retention, 12mo monthly
  - Security tests: 39/39 pass (`ivx-enterprise-recovery.test.ts`)
- **Phase 2 Enterprise Certification EXECUTED — ALL 10 SECTIONS VERIFIED**
- **Enterprise Time Zone System FULLY DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED IN PRODUCTION**:
  - Initial deploy: GitHub `9ed0f6648b58`, Render deploy `dep-d99umb3fst1c73cr2r7g` LIVE
  - 69/69 tests pass (157 expect() calls, 0 fail)
  - 17/17 API endpoints verified live: 10 public (200 PASS) + 7 auth-protected (401 BLOCKED)
  - 8 cities verified live: NY `01:00 PM -04:00 EDT`, Miami same, California `10:00 AM -07:00 PDT`, London `06:00 PM +01:00`, Madrid `07:00 PM +02:00`, Dubai `09:00 PM +04:00`, Tokyo `02:00 AM +09:00`, Sydney `03:00 AM +10:00`
  - DST transitions verified: NY Jan=-05:00 STD → Jul=-04:00 DST; Sydney Jan=+11:00 summer → Jul=+10:00 winter
  - Audit log format verified: UTC `2026-07-12T17:00:00.000Z`, Local `Jul 12, 2026, 01:00:00 PM EDT`, TZ `America/New_York`, Offset `-04:00`, Device `iPhone 15 Pro`
  - Timezone routes are at `/api/timezone/*` (NOT `/api/ivx/timezone/*`)
  - Routes registered in `backend/hono.ts` line 4896: `registerTimezoneRoutes(app)`
- **Audit-batch bug FIXED AND DEPLOYED**:
  - Fix: `backend/api/ivx-timezone.ts` now accepts `utc_timestamp`/`utcTimestamp`/`utc` and `timezone`/`timeZone` field names
  - Deployed: GitHub `848c8ef17dbc`, Render deploy `dep-d99uslurnols73ffgp80` LIVE
- **Reels UI full-screen vertical feed DEPLOYED** — commit `025a014` → GitHub `abd491355233`
- **Backend deal enrichment fix DEPLOYED** — commit `e0bdbc5` → GitHub `707ce8c2686c`
- **Phase 1 QA fixes DEPLOYED** — Security fix commit `fd5f4d4` → GitHub `fd5f4d4acaed`
- **Video feed API verified live**: `/api/ivx/video-platform/feed` returns deal videos including "Casa Rosario — Pembroke Pines, FL"
- **Landing page color fixes DEPLOYED AND VERIFIED CLEAN**: `landing.tsx` and `InstagramProjectCard.tsx` grep for legacy colors returns 0 matches
- **Reels card redesigned and DEPLOYED**: commit `730aa4d` on GitHub main, Render deploy `dep-d99vsf58nd3s73d3pq8g` LIVE
- **Supabase backend login VERIFIED WORKING**: direct test with owner credentials returns HTTP 200, access_token present, user_id `9b280e15-f9fd-459f-bf2d-530b1ed84cb1`
- **Sign-in timeout added**: `expo/lib/auth-password-sign-in.ts` now has 20-second timeout via `Promise.race` to prevent infinite loading spinner
- **Cache-control headers added**: `expo/public/_headers` created with `max-age=0, must-revalidate` for HTML to prevent stale bundle caching
- **Sign-in timeout + cache headers DEPLOYED**: commit `5703894`, deploy `dep-d9a03pt8nd3s73d3vio0` LIVE, bundle `entry-470fb179e6041485652728bee0ae0917.js`
- **Chat UX fixes DEPLOYED, LIVE, AND E2E VERIFIED**:
  - Commit `c0470a3` → GitHub main, Render deploy `dep-d9a0dlr7uimc73f9gls0` LIVE
  - New bundle: `entry-8dace4329317e1355caeb0d816371488.js`
  - Fix 1 — Typing text disappearing: `KeyboardAvoidingView` with `behavior="height"` on web caused layout shifts. Web branch now uses plain `View`
  - Fix 2 — Old conversations: Added 24h expiry (`HISTORY_MAX_AGE_MS = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000`) + timestamp sort in `chat-persistence.ts`
  - Fix 3 — Excessive loading: Initial `connectionStatus` changed from `'connecting'` to `'connected'`; removed artificial 2s timer
  - Fix 4 — Scroll-to-latest: Added 50ms `setTimeout` delay on web
  - E2E QA: 5/5 AI chat messages returned OK, backend healthy, TypeScript 0 errors
  - User confirmed: typing fixed YES, loading fixed YES
- **IVX Registration Redesign — COMPONENT BUILT, TYPESCRIPT CLEAN**:
  - Created `expo/components/IVXAuthCard.tsx` (~1900 lines) — premium glass card auth component
  - Features: animated Sign Up/Login tabs with sliding gold indicator, glass morphism (BlurView native / backdrop-filter web), IVX logo + "Invest. Build. Grow." tagline, all registration fields (First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Password, Confirm Password, 7-role selector, optional profile picture), password strength indicator with animated colored bar, inline validation with error messages, email verification + phone OTP 6-digit code flow, Remember Me + Forgot Password, secure badges (256-bit Encryption, Privacy Protected), fully responsive
  - Created `expo/app/auth.tsx` — unified `/auth` route supporting `?mode=signup`, `?mode=owner`
  - Updated `expo/app/landing.tsx` — navigation now routes to `/auth`:
    - "Create Free Account" → "Get Started" → `/auth?mode=signup`
    - "Sign In" → `/auth`
    - Owner login links → `/auth?mode=owner`
    - Secondary sign-in → `/auth`
  - Web glass CSS injected via `injectGlassCss()` function (backdrop-filter, box-shadow, blur)
  - TypeScript passes clean for IVXAuthCard, auth.tsx, and landing.tsx (`bunx tsc --noEmit` 0 errors)
  - Fixed multiple TS errors during dev: FileSystem import (static `expo-file-system/legacy`), `login()` signature (takes email + password as separate string args, not object), `className` on View (cast as any), web-only CSS props removed from StyleSheet.create

### In Progress
- Deploy IVX registration redesign to production (commit + push + Render deploy)
- Capture screenshots of Login and Registration on Android, iOS, and Web

### Blocked
- **Database migration for timezone columns** — Supabase service role key not available in sandbox; SQL provided in `PROFILES_TIMEZONE_MIGRATION_SQL`
- **PITR confirmation** — requires owner to check Supabase Dashboard → Database → Backups
- **Off-site/cross-account backup** — requires owner-controlled AWS S3 bucket with separate credentials
- **Immutable backup storage** — requires object lock/immutability on separate storage
- **APK build** — sandbox OOM kills Gradle; recommended EAS Build or building on a real computer
- **Owner credentials in sandbox** — `IVX_OWNER_EMAIL`, `IVX_OWNER_PASSWORD`, `IVX_OWNER_TOKEN` all MISSING from environment
- **Expo web build in sandbox** — `bunx expo export --platform web` times out at 60s sandbox limit; must rely on Render's build pipeline
- **Full color remediation pass** — remaining legacy colors in `login.tsx` (`#F59E0B`), `intro-context.tsx`, `TrafficIntelTab.tsx`, `verification-service.ts`, `platform-config.ts`
- **Cloudflare cache purge** — no Cloudflare API token available; must rely on cache-control headers + natural expiry
- **`/api/ivx/owner-passwordless-login` endpoint** — returns "IVX_OWNER_PASSWORD is not configured on the backend" — backend env var missing on Render
- **Screenshots on real devices** — sandbox cannot run Android/iOS emulators; web screenshots possible via curl but not rendered DOM

## Key Decisions
- UTC is the only storage format; `nowUtc()` returns `new Date().toISOString()`
- IANA timezone database handles DST automatically — no manual adjustment needed
- `detectDeviceTimezone()` uses `Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone` on all platforms
- Orphan branch approach for GitHub push: `git checkout --orphan <branch>`, `git rm -r --cached -f .rork/history/`, `git add -A`, commit, `git push github <branch>:main --force`
- Render auto-deploys on GitHub push to main
- Owner sign-in uses standard Supabase email+password auth, NOT the `/api/ivx/owner-passwordless-login` backend endpoint
- `chat.ivxholding.com` served by Render static site `srv-d7t9j00sfn5c738a18j0`, builds with `bunx expo export --platform web`, publishes `./dist`, rootDir `expo`, branch `main`
- API backend is Render web service `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0`, domain `api.ivxholding.com`
- Chat persistence: 24h expiry chosen so conversations from previous day are still available but months-old stale threads are discarded
- Web chat uses plain `View` instead of `KeyboardAvoidingView` — browser handles keyboard/viewport natively
- Chat `connectionStatus` initial state is `'connected'` (not `'connecting'`) to eliminate artificial loading delays
- Registration redesign uses `IVXAuthCard` as unified component handling both login and signup with animated tab switching
- `login()` in auth-context takes `(email: string, password: string)` as separate args — NOT an object
- `register()` in auth-context takes object `{ email, password, firstName, lastName, phone?, country, accountType? }`
- `MemberService.registerMember()` is the primary registration API
